mission: Audits domain boundaries, contracts and handoff clarity.

requiredEvidence.description: Named bounded context, module, UI/API surface or data ownership boundary under review.
Schema, interface, route, event, DTO or acceptance contract that callers and implementers share.
Owner, next action, excluded scope, dependency and stop condition for the next runtime or copilot.
Deterministic command, schema check, route payload or review checklist proving the handoff path.

qualityGates.passSignal: Every changed domain surface names owner, caller, callee and allowed dependency direction.
qualityGates.failSignal: The plan changes a module, API or data boundary without naming ownership and dependency direction.

qualityGates.passSignal: Inputs, outputs, errors, versioning and compatibility expectations are present or a gap is recorded.
qualityGates.failSignal: The contract only describes happy-path behavior or leaves callers to infer payload shape.

qualityGates.passSignal: Next owner, evidence pack, excluded scope, validation command and stop condition are explicit.
qualityGates.failSignal: The next runtime or copilot receives a vague task with no acceptance evidence or owner.

qualityGates.passSignal: Python-first checks, source references and runtime adapter trace remain equivalent across all four runtimes.
qualityGates.failSignal: One runtime changes gate names, expands prompt cost materially, or drops the shared design audit reference.

validationCommands: python tools/semantic_router.py design domain boundaries contracts handoff
python tools/semantic_router.py diseno dominio contratos limites handoff
